description: The user hovers over the 'Save these preferences' toggle at the bottom of the screen.
frame_description: The Explore page is visible with a list of opportunities. A 'Save these preferences' toggle is at the bottom.

description: The user hovers over the 'Tasks' tab in the bottom navigation bar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the bottom navigation bar, hovering over the Tasks icon.

description: The user hovers over the 'Save these preferences' toggle again.
frame_description: The cursor returns to the toggle switch above the navigation bar.

description: The user hovers over the 'AI Interview' opportunity card.
frame_description: The cursor moves up to hover over a pink opportunity card labeled 'AI Interview'.

description: The user scrolls down the list of opportunities.
frame_description: The list of opportunity cards moves upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: The user hovers over the 'Video Call' opportunity card after scrolling.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over a pink card for a 'Video Call' session.

description: The user scrolls further down the page.
frame_description: The page content continues to move up, revealing more items.

description: The user hovers over an 'AI Interview' card in the 'Short tasks & surveys' section.
frame_description: The cursor hovers over a smaller card in a horizontal scrolling section.

description: The user scrolls up the page.
frame_description: The page content moves down as the user scrolls up.

description: The user performs multiple rapid scrolls up and down the opportunity list, appearing to browse the available options.
frame_description: The screen content moves up and down repeatedly as the user browses the list.

description: The user clicks on the filter icon in the top right corner of the screen.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the top right and clicks the blue filter icon.

description: The 'Filter Opportunities' modal slides up from the bottom of the screen.
frame_description: A modal window with various filter options (Task Type, Duration, Pay Rate) appears over the list.

description: The user hovers over the 'Clear All' button within the filter modal.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the top right of the modal, over the 'Clear All' text.

description: The user hovers over the 'X' close button in the filter modal.
frame_description: The cursor moves slightly to the right, over the 'X' icon in the modal header.

description: The filter modal is closed, returning the user to the main opportunity list.
frame_description: The modal slides back down, revealing the full opportunity list again.

description: The user continues to scroll up and down the list of opportunities.
frame_description: The list content moves vertically as the user resumes browsing.

description: The user hovers over the 'AI Interview' card.
frame_description: The cursor pauses briefly over the pink AI Interview card.

description: The user hovers over the 'Video Call' card.
frame_description: The cursor moves up to hover over the Video Call card.

description: The user performs final scrolls through the list before the segment ends.
frame_description: The page content moves up and down as the user continues to browse.
